tracks.meaning: an authoritative regulation or law that governs conduct or procedure
to exercise control or authority over something or someone
a set of instructions or conditions that determine how a system or program behaves
a strip or line used as a standard for measuring or drawing straight lines
a method, pattern, or general principle that usually applies in a given situation
a guideline or standard that governs thought, behavior, or decision-making
a formula or principle that applies consistently to a class of phenomena
the period of reign of a monarch or sovereign
to penalize or impose sanctions on someone for breaking a rule or law
a thin metal strip used to create lines or borders in typesetting
a standard operating procedure that defines how work should be performed
